connection.title: Connection Settings
connection.host: IP address or hostname of your ioBroker server
connection.port: Port of the Admin adapter instance (recommended: dedicated instance on port 8091)

authentication.title: Authentication
authentication.none: Leave username and password empty for no authentication
authentication.oauth: Enter valid ioBroker credentials for OAuth2 authentication
authentication.warning: Session duration should be ≥3600 seconds (1 hour) in ioBroker settings

setup.title: Recommended Setup
setup.dedicated: Create a dedicated Admin adapter instance for Node-RED connections
setup.isolation: Isolates Node-RED traffic from main admin interface
